last_cycle.summary: Q120 PASS: ENV taxonomy x GSAE topology design doc. ENV-3=isolated cluster (safe prune), ENV-1=hub node (dampen only). Intervention protocols per ENV type. Unifies incrimination + graph-theoretic views for Paper C safety chapter.
